name: European Bank Transaction Analyzer
description: Analyze European bank transactions and match receipts via PSD2 Open Banking. Uses FiBuKI.com connections to browse accounts, search payments, auto-match invoices, categorize expenses, and manage partners. 25 tools.

channel.blurb: Analyze European bank transactions via PSD2 Open Banking — match receipts, categorize expenses, track bookkeeping

apiKey.description: Your FiBuKI API key. Generate at fibuki.com > Settings > Integrations > AI Agents, or run: npx @fibukiapp/cli auth
